title: Authorize Remote Execution of Privileged Commands and Remote Access to Security-Relevant Information
description: authorize remote execution of privileged commands and remote access to security-relevant information via remote access only for operational needs

checks.name: Privileged Commands Authorized for Remote Execution are Identified
checks.purpose: Identification of privileged commands authorized for remote execution is an organizational GRC documentation concern and is not technically verifiable via automated check on Windows Client

checks.name: Security-Relevant Information Authorized for Remote Access is Identified
checks.purpose: Identification of security-relevant information authorized for remote access is an organizational GRC documentation concern and is not technically verifiable via automated check on Windows Client

checks.name: Remote Execution of Privileged Commands is Authorized
checks.purpose: Verify that remote execution of privileged commands via WinRM and PowerShell remoting is restricted to named privileged accounts and that WinRM access is scoped to approved sources

checks.name: Remote Access to Security-Relevant Information is Authorized
checks.purpose: Verify that remote access to security-relevant information such as audit logs, security policy, and registry security keys is restricted to named privileged accounts via NTFS and registry permissions

checks.name: Privileged Commands Authorized for Remote Execution are Identified
checks.purpose: Identification of privileged commands authorized for remote execution is an organizational GRC documentation concern and is not technically verifiable via automated check on Windows Server

checks.name: Security-Relevant Information Authorized for Remote Access is Identified
checks.purpose: Identification of security-relevant information authorized for remote access is an organizational GRC documentation concern and is not technically verifiable via automated check on Windows Server

checks.name: Remote Execution of Privileged Commands is Authorized
checks.purpose: Verify that WinRM and PowerShell remoting are restricted to named AD privileged groups, WinRM listeners are scoped to internal addresses, and remote execution audit logging is active

checks.name: Remote Access to Security-Relevant Information is Authorized
checks.purpose: Verify that remote access to security-relevant information such as AD audit logs, GPO settings, and security event logs is restricted to named privileged AD groups via share and NTFS permissions

checks.name: Privileged Commands Authorized for Remote Execution are Identified
checks.purpose: Identification of privileged commands authorized for remote execution is an organizational GRC documentation concern and is not technically verifiable via automated check on Linux

checks.name: Security-Relevant Information Authorized for Remote Access is Identified
checks.purpose: Identification of security-relevant information authorized for remote access is an organizational GRC documentation concern and is not technically verifiable via automated check on Linux

checks.name: Remote Execution of Privileged Commands is Authorized
checks.purpose: Verify that remote sudo execution is scoped to named accounts via sudoers, SSH forced commands restrict what remote sessions can execute, and root remote login is disabled

checks.name: Remote Access to Security-Relevant Information is Authorized
checks.purpose: Verify that remote access to security-relevant files such as audit logs, sudoers, and SSH configuration is restricted via file permissions and ACLs to named privileged accounts only

checks.name: Privileged Commands Authorized for Remote Execution are Identified
checks.purpose: Identification of privileged commands authorized for remote execution is an organizational GRC documentation concern and is not technically verifiable via automated check on Debian

checks.name: Security-Relevant Information Authorized for Remote Access is Identified
checks.purpose: Identification of security-relevant information authorized for remote access is an organizational GRC documentation concern and is not technically verifiable via automated check on Debian

checks.name: Remote Execution of Privileged Commands is Authorized
checks.purpose: Verify that remote sudo execution is scoped to named accounts via sudoers, SSH forced commands restrict what remote sessions can execute, and root remote login is disabled

checks.name: Remote Access to Security-Relevant Information is Authorized
checks.purpose: Verify that remote access to security-relevant files such as audit logs, sudoers, and SSH configuration is restricted via file permissions and ACLs to named privileged accounts only
